briefdescription.para: Not ready state.
Ready state.
Reset state.
Configured state.
Initialised state.
Operational state.
Initialises an instance of the driver.

detaileddescription.para: Traverse "/sys/bus/platform/device" directory (in Linux), to find registered PRACH device with the name DeviceNodeName. The first available slot in the instance array XDfePrach_Prach[] will be taken as a DeviceNodeName object. On success it moves the state machine to a Ready state, while on failure stays in a Not Ready state.

listitem.para: Pointer to the instance if successful.

briefdescription.para: Closes the instance of a PRACH driver and moves the state machine to a Not Ready state.
Resets PRACH and moves the state machine into a reset state.
Reads configuration from device tree/xparameters.h and IP registers.

detaileddescription.para: Removes S/W reset and moves the state machine to a Configured state.

briefdescription.para: DFE PRACH driver one time initialisation also moves the state machine to an Initialised state.
Activates PRACH and moves the state machine to an Activated state.
Deactivates PRACH and moves the state machine to Initialised state.
Returns the state machine state id.
Returns the current CC configuration.

Returns configuration structure CCCfg with CCCfg->Sequence.Length value set in XDfePrach_Configure(), array CCCfg->Sequence.CCID[] members are set to not used value (-1) and the other CCCfg members are set to 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 *CCSeqBitmap, XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, const u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_GetCarrierCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CC configuration of a specific CCID from a selected band in multi band mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 *CCSeqBitmap, XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_GetCarrierCfg

briefdescription.para: Returns the current CC configuration of a specific CCID in single band mode or from band 0 in multi band mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, const u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration, to a local CC configuration structure for the chosen band in multi band mode.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error.
The returned CCCfg->Sequence must be translated because there is no explicit indication that a slot is unused. A zero value in the register can indicate either a slot with ID = 0 or an unused slot.

Therefore, the sequence data returned in CCCfg->Sequence is not identical to what is written in the registers. The translation is as follows:
Sequence.CCID[i] = -1 - if [i] is unused slot
Sequence.CCID[i] = CCID - if [i] is used slot
a returned Sequence.Length = length in register + 1

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 CCSeqBitmap, const XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds specified CCID, with specified configuration, to a local CC configuration structure for single band mode or on Band 0 for multi band mode.

detaileddescription.para: If there is insufficient capacity for the new CC the function will return an error.
The returned CCCfg->Sequence must be translated because there is no explicit indication that a slot is unused. A zero value in the register can indicate either a slot with ID = 0 or an unused slot.

Therefore, the sequence data returned in CCCfg->Sequence is not identical to what is written in the registers. The translation is as follows:
Sequence.CCID[i] = -1 - if [i] is unused slot
Sequence.CCID[i] = CCID - if [i] is used slot
a returned Sequence.Length = length in register + 1

memberdef.argsstring: (XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, const u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_RemoveCCfromCCCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID from a local CC configuration structure for selected band in multi band mode.

simplesect.para: For sequence conversion see XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg() comment.

briefdescription.para: Removes specified CCID from a local CC configuration structure in single band mode or for Band 0 in multi band mode.

simplesect.para: For sequence conversion see XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg() comment.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, const XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, const u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_UpdateCCinCCCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID, with specified configuration to a local CC configuration structure for selected band in multi band mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_CCCfg *CCCfg, s32 CCID, const XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_UpdateCCinCCCfg

briefdescription.para: Updates specified CCID, with specified configuration to a local CC configuration structure in single band mode or for Band 0 in multi band mode.
Writes local CC configuration to the shadow (NEXT) registers and triggers copying from shadow to operational registers.
Returns the current RACH Channel configuration.
Returns an empty Rach channel configuration.
Returns RACH channel configuration for a specific RCId.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_DDCCfg *DdcCfg, XDfePrach_NCO *NcoCfg, XDfePrach_Schedule *StaticSchedule, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg, u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddRCtoRCCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Adds a new RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration for multi band mode.

parameterdescription.para: Schedule data container. Unused if operating in "Always On" mode, where internal scheduler is removed at core generation.

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg, u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddRCtoRCCfgMBDynamic

briefdescription.para: Adds a new RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration for multi band mode in dynamic mode.

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_DDCCfg *DdcCfg, XDfePrach_NCO *NcoCfg, XDfePrach_Schedule *StaticSchedule, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddRCtoRCCfg

briefdescription.para: Adds a new RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration.

detaileddescription.para: Must be used when the core is configured with a single band. It can be used to add an RC which captures from a CC in band 0 in multi band mode.

parameterdescription.para: Schedule Data Container. Not required and can be ignored for "Always On" mode, where the internal scheduler is removed at core configuration.

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_AddRCtoRCCfgDynamic

briefdescription.para: Adds a new RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration in dynamic mode.

detaileddescription.para: Must be used when the core is configured with a single band. It can be used to add an RC which captures from a CC in band 0 in multi band mode.

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg.

briefdescription.para: Removes an RC configuration entry from the RACH Channel configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_DDCCfg *DdcCfg, XDfePrach_NCO *NcoCfg, XDfePrach_Schedule *StaticSchedule, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg, u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_UpdateRCinRCCfgMB

briefdescription.para: Updates an RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration in multi band mode (RC entry updated for an RCId associated with PRACH extraction on a CC of a specific band).

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg and XDfePrach_UpdateCCinCCCfg.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, XDfePrach_RCCfg *CurrentRCCfg, s32 CCID, u32 RCId, u32 RachChan, XDfePrach_DDCCfg *DdcCfg, XDfePrach_NCO *NcoCfg, XDfePrach_Schedule *StaticSchedule, XDfePrach_CCCfg *NextCCCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_UpdateRCinRCCfg

briefdescription.para: Updates an RC entry to the RACH Channel configuration in single band mode (can also be used to update the RC entry of an RCId associated with PRACH extraction on a CC of band 0 in multi band mode).

simplesect.para: This API must be executed only after all CC configurations are done with the API XDfePrach_AddCCtoCCCfg and XDfePrach_UpdateCCinCCCfg.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current trigger configuration.
Sets trigger configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, bool Next, s32 CCID, XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_GetCC

briefdescription.para: Gets the specified CCID carrier configuration from either Current or Next registers in single band mode or for band 0 in multi band mode.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag indicating NEXT(1) or CURRENT(0) register.

memberdef.argsstring: (const XDfePrach *InstancePtr, bool Next, s32 CCID, XDfePrach_CarrierCfg *CarrierCfg, u32 BandId)
memberdef.name: XDfePrach_GetCCMB

briefdescription.para: Gets the specified CCID carrier configuration from either Current or Next registers for a selected band in multi-band mode.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag indicating NEXT(1) or CURRENT(0) register.

briefdescription.para: Returns the PRACH status registers.
Clears the PRACH status registers.
Captures phase for the phase accumulator output of all RACH channels in associated AXI-lite registers.
Returns the captured phase accumulator output for a given Rach Channel.
Sets the delay, which is added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP) in single band mode or for band 0 in multi band mode.
Sets the delay of specified band in multi band mode, which is added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Returns the delay, which is added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP) in single band mode or for band 0 in multi band mode.
Returns the delay of specified band in multi band mode, which is added to TUSER and TLAST (delay matched through the IP).
Returns data latency in single band mode or for band 0 in multi-band mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the PRACH instance in single band mode or for band 0 in multi-band mode.

briefdescription.para: Returns data latency of specified band in multi band mode.
Returns the driver and HW design version.
Returns interrupt mask status.
Sets the interrupt mask.

parameterdescription.para:
Interrupt mask flags container.
0 - does not mask corresponding interrupt
1 - masks corresponding interrupt

briefdescription.para: Returns the event status.
Clears the event status.

parameterdescription.para:
Clear event status container.
0 - does not clear corresponding event status
1 - clear corresponding event status

briefdescription.para: Driver's minor version number.
Driver's major version number.
30720000 is the base sample rate
Error margin in frequency calculation.
Minimum frequency value.
Maximum frequency value.
Maximum CC sample rate value (245.76Ms/s)
Maximum number of driver instances running at the same time.
Success flag.
Failure flag.
Node name maximum length.
Maximum CC number.
Maximum number of RACH channels.
Maximum NCO number.
Maximum anntena number.
Maximum CC sequence length.
Maximum number of bands.
Device location in a file system.
Device tree property.
System bus name.
Base address property.
Number of antenna 1-8.
Number of antenna 1-8.
Number of antenna 1-8.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Maximum number of CC's per antenna 16.
Number of Parallel Data Channels 1-4.
Number of Parallel Data Channels 1-4.
Number of Parallel Data Channels 1-4.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
Number of Antenna TDM slots, per CC 1-8.
Number of RACH output Lanes 1-2.
Number of RACH Channels channels 1-16.
The continuous scheduling is present.
The AXIS dynamic scheduling control interface is present.
The core has an IRQ port enabled.
Number of bands.
